positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of interconnected bioluminescent tropical flora and celestial elements, forming a symmetrical mandala pattern. The main subject is a dense grouping of stylized lilies, ferns, and ethereal nebulae swirling around a central point. Use a high-contrast, neo-art deco aesthetic with clean silhouettes. The color palette should be deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, royal purple) contrasted sharply with luminous teal and gold highlights. The composition must be perfectly balanced and centered, designed for seamless repeat printing on fabric. Studio macro photography style, clean vector lines, volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, dirty, grainy, noise, abstract background, gradient, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, cropped, out of frame
